title: People across Tamil Nadu want a change, there is anti-incumbency: AIADMK leader-candidate D. Jayakumar
description: Former Minister D. Jayakumar says every party in the alliance has its own ideology, but the AIADMK will not be influenced by them. Confident of a win because of the party’s strong voter base and coalition votes, the Royapuram candidate promises to develop infrastructure and fulfil the people’s needs
